messages:
Hi Omar, 
I hope you are doing well.

I am interested in booking this apartment, as I will be staying with my husband for four nights. Could you please confirm whether the apartment is in the exact listed location, and whether cleaning service is included or available upon request? 

Thank you!
I guess twice for the full stay is okay with me (every two days)
Okay let me double check on that with my partner I will confirm that upon arrival is that olay?
Maybe y can refresh the availability from ur side
So can I book this one now ?
I tried to finalize the booking but it didn’t work
Do u want me to make the reservation here via the app or directly in cash ?
The important is for the apartment to be here at the silver palm
My mom can’t use the elevator
But it’s okay I think we can manage
I would really appreciate if you can arrange an early check in for us
As said I hv a baby and we can’t stay waiting this much
We will check out around 11-12 from the current one and would like to go directly
Plz don’t forget the baby crib
Just put it in the biggest room that has an integrated bathroom
One question, check in instructions says that apartment is in the first floor, is it correct ! I remember u said it was at the third.. just double checking
ممكن ادخل قبل الوقت بعد اذنك

Hello Omar, how are you? 
Me and my family are coming to wedding in Cairo and we want to rent the apartment?
بس الوالدة راح توصل القاهرة يوم ٥ هيا الي راح تستلم الشقة
أنا طلبت استاجر الشقة من يوم ٥ نوفمبر يعني تمديد يومين
كنت باستفسر عندك شقة اكبر من الشقة هذي
بس كنت ابغا اشوف وحدة لعائلة ثانية
لو سمحت الشقة بتعتك في نفس الكمبوند بتاع سيلفر بالم
ابغا شقة غرفة وحدة او غرفتين في نفس الكامبوند
في رقم موبايل عشان اعطي والدتي تتواصل معاك يوم وصولها للقاهرة
Thank my sister will send it to you on her WhatsApp. She will check in with my mom
